=====On hand=====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Penny
|pkmn=Sylveon
|gender=female
|type1=Fairy
|tera=Fairy
|img=Penny Sylveon.png
|cap=Penny's Sylveon
|img2=Penny Sylveon Terastal.png
|cap2=Penny's Terastallized Sylveon
|epnum=HZ101
|epname=Terastallization vs. Mega Evolution!
|vajp=Kei Shindō
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Sylveon}} is Penny's first known Pokémon and her main partner. Inspired by {{an|Nemona}} and [[Roy]]'s [[Double Battle]], she challenged [[Dot]] to one as well, partnering Sylveon with {{p|Flareon}} in ''[[HZ101|Terastallization vs. Mega Evolution!]]''.

The battle begun in the [[HZ102|next episode]]. After exchanging a couple of attacks, Sylveon's {{a|Cute Charm}} [[Ability]] activated, hindering {{TP|Dot|Quaxwell}}'s performance in battle and allowing for Penny's Pokémon to gang on {{TP|Dot|Tinkatuff}}. In the end, both Sylveon and Quaxwell {{Tera}}stallized, but Flareon landed the finishing blow, defeating Quaxwell and making Penny win by default.

In ''[[HZ120|Dot and Penny's Top-Secret Mission!]]'', Sylveon accompanied Penny during the mission at the [[Exceed]] Museum. When Dot and Penny were cornered by [[Indi]], [[Rubina]], and [[Chalce]], Penny used Sylveon along with {{p|Jolteon}} to battle alongside Dot's Pokémon. When Chalce separated Dot from Penny, Penny battled with Sylveon and Jolteon against Indi and Rubina's Pokémon. Despite Dot's concern, Penny managed to win the battle against the two [[Explorers]].

In ''[[HZ135|The Core Awakens]]'', Sylveon joined the other Pokémon in their mission to erase the [[Laquium]]. When Indi and Rubina attempted to stop them with their {{p|Electrode}}, Sylveon tried to stop them, only to be defeated by their {{m|Explosion}}, temporarily jeopardizing the mission until Coral and her Screamypuff arrived to fill the gap Sylveon's defeat left behind.

Sylveon's known moves are {{m|Moonblast}}, {{m|Disarming Voice}}, and {{m|Reflect}}, and her Ability is {{a|Cute Charm}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Penny
|pkmn=Flareon
|type1=Fire
|img=Penny Flareon.png
|epnum=HZ101
|epname=Terastallization vs. Mega Evolution!
|vajp=Arisa Shida
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Flareon}} is Penny's second known Pokémon. Inspired by {{an|Nemona}} and [[Roy]]'s [[Double Battle]], she challenged [[Dot]] to one as well, partnering Flareon with {{p|Sylveon}}.

The battle begun in the [[HZ102|next episode]]. In the end, both Sylveon and {{TP|Dot|Quaxwell}} {{Tera}}stallized, but Flareon landed the finishing blow, defeating Quaxwell and making Penny win by default.

In ''[[HZ133|The Final Battle Is Near]]'', Flareon was the third Pokémon Penny used in her battle against [[Indi]] and [[Rubina]]'s {{p|Cofagrigus}} and {{p|Runerigus}}. After [[Hamber]] arrived to assist, Flareon was able to defeat their Pokémon with {{m|Heat Wave}}. In ''[[HZ135|The Core Awakens]]'', Penny used Flareon to fight against the Laquium Core.

Flareon's known moves are {{m|Flamethrower}}, {{m|Swift}}, and {{m|Heat Wave}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Penny
|pkmn=Jolteon
|type1=Electric
|img=Penny Jolteon.png
|epnum=HZ120
|epname=Dot and Penny's Top-Secret Mission!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Jolteon}} is Penny's third known Pokémon. She used it to help {{p|Sylveon}} and [[Dot]]'s Pokémon battle against [[Chalce]], [[Indi]], and [[Rubina]]'s Pokémon. After being separated from Dot, Penny used Jolteon to support Sylveon in the battle against the [[Explorers]]' {{p|Drapion}} and {{p|Scolipede}}. Despite the opponents becoming stronger due to [[Laquium]], Penny and her Pokémon managed to win the battle, escaping the [[Exceed]] Museum with Dot.

In ''[[HZ133|The Final Battle Is Near]]'', Jolteon was the first Pokémon Penny used in her battle against [[Indi]] and [[Rubina]]'s {{p|Cofagrigus}} and {{p|Runerigus}}. Jolteon immediately defeated one of the Cofagrigus, but was ultimately knocked out as a result of its {{m|Destiny Bond}}.

Jolteon's known moves are {{m|Thunder Fang}}, {{m|Pin Missile}}, and {{m|Thunderbolt}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Penny
|pkmn=Vaporeon
|type1=Water
|img=Penny Vaporeon.png
|epnum=HZ127
|epname=The Training Royale!
|vajp=
|vaen=
|desc={{p|Vaporeon}} is Penny's fourth known Pokémon. It was used to battle against [[Dot's Quaxwell]] and was able to win after targetting [[Dot's Tinkaton]] and {{TP|Dot|Gholdengo}}, forcing Quaxwell to protect them, resulting in his defeat and causing Penny to win the battle.

In ''[[HZ133|The Final Battle Is Near]]'', Vaporeon was the second Pokémon Penny used in her battle against [[Indi]] and [[Rubina]]'s {{p|Cofagrigus}} and {{p|Runerigus}}. It became affected by the opponent's Curse immediately, dealing damage to it while being unable to attack or switch out due to Destiny Bond and Mean Look. After Dot's Gholdengo sacrificed itself to defeat the Runerigus and Cofagrigus, Vaporeon was able to be recalled and freed from Curse's effects.

Vaporeon's known moves are {{m|Trailblaze}}, {{m|Whirlpool}}, and {{m|Muddy Water}}, and its Ability is {{a|Water Absorb}}.}}
